body_excerpt: In hid_alloc_report_buf of hid-core.c, there is a possible leak of kernel memory contents to a USB HID due to uninitialized data. This could lead to physical information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
